name: Spring Vegetable Stir-Fry - Menu #1
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Asparagus; cut diagonally into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium-high heat.
2. Add the carrots and cook, stirring frequently, until they begin to soften, about 8 to 10 minutes.
3. Add the asparagus and sugar snap peas and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Stir in the wine, tarragon, salt, and pepper.
5. Cover the skillet and reduce the heat to low.
6. Simmer until all vegetables are tender, approximately 2 minutes.
7. Serve in 20 minutes.
Ready to serve in 20 minutes.
